title: Five For Friday
excerpt: We made it to Friday! And I know this was supposed to be a weekly regular feature, but I have failed to make it so. Forgive me? 1. When I spotted this gorgeous layout (and video tutorial) by Mandalika Designs…
body:
We made it to Friday! And I know this was supposed to be a weekly regular feature, but I have failed to make it so. Forgive me? 1. When I spotted this gorgeous layout (and video tutorial) by Mandalika Designs, I knew I had to share. Such a great use of Plus One!

2. Check out this adorable Cut & Paste Daybook that Sakuralala made to document her CHA adventure!

3. I can't get over all the incredible Plus One projects that Olennka has been posting in the SC Gallery! So much inspiration.

4. Now this is a quote I can get behind:

5. Having such a great time at Craftcation in Ventura!
